title: From Idea to Code: Building with Miro and Kiro — Live
summary: A live session demonstrating how Miro and Kiro work together to move from idea to working code. Seán Winters and Brian Beach show visual collaboration with AI-assisted development through prototyping and building, with examples from hackathons in Paris, Amsterdam, LA, and New York.
writeup: This live session demonstrates how Miro and Kiro connect to carry a project from initial idea to working code. Seán Winters and Brian Beach pair visual collaboration in Miro with AI-assisted development in Kiro, walking through prototyping and building. The examples draw on hackathons held in Paris, Amsterdam, LA, and New York, showing the visual-to-code workflow in practice.
